title: humboltia rubens
intro: Humboltia rubens, also known as Kalmegh, is a plant species that belongs to the family Capparaceae. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Humboltia rubens include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting immune function. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, decoctions, and capsules, and is also used as a topical application for skin issues.
